member.name: T:Iconify.IconCache
member.summary: Fetches icons from the Iconify API and caches them as textures. Handles disk cache and in-memory cache with proper null safety.

member.name: M:Iconify.IconCache.GetOrFetch(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get an icon texture from cache or fetch from the Iconify API.

member.name: P:Iconify.IconifyPanel.Icon
member.summary: The icon identifier. Format: "prefix:name" e.g. "ph:house", "mdi:home", "tabler:settings" Browse: https://icones.js.org/

member.name: P:Iconify.IconifyPanel.Color
member.summary: Icon color as a hex or named color. Default: white.
